h1. Security

{info:title=Documentation Metadata}
Purpose: Security posture, controls, and recommended hardening.\\
Source file: {code}SECURITY.md{code}\\
Generated (UTC): 2026-02-25 15:51:58Z
{info}

h2. Content

h2. Supported Versions
Currently supporting version 1.0.x

h2. Reporting Vulnerabilities
Report to: security@example.com
PGP Key: [Your PGP key]

h2. Security Features
* TLS 1.2+ only
* Rate limiting
* SQL injection prevention
* XSS protection
* CSRF protection
* Security headers

h2. Best Practices
# Rotate secrets every 90 days
# Use strong passwords (32+ chars)
# Enable firewall
# Regular updates
# Monitor logs
# Backup data
